content.en:
"The Invincible Dao Ancestor has fallen?"

When Ye Tian heard the news, he couldn't believe it at all!

That is an invincible Dao Ancestor, an existence that is above the strongest Dao Ancestor and second only to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, how can it easily fall?

Unless it is a lord-level forbidden zerg, it is unlikely that the invincible Dao Ancestor will fall.

And the lord-level forbidden zerg never hides their aura, once it appears, the half-step domain ancestors will definitely stop it, how can the invincible Dao ancestor fall?

Soon, Ye Tian got specific news.

The fallen Invincible Dao Ancestor was an invincible Dao Ancestor from the Temple of Ten Thousand Domains - Blazing Dao Ancestor, the Blazing Dao Ancestor was besieged by ten commander-level forbidden Zerg, and was trapped in an initial realm, unable to escape, and the half-step domain ancestors were killed before they could be rescued.

It stands to reason that even if the Invincible Dao Ancestor Blazing Fire Dao Ancestor is besieged by ten commander-level forbidden Zergs, it will not fall soon, and it is enough to support the half-step Domain Ancestor to hold on!

But afterwards, after the speculation of a half-step domain ancestor, the Blazing Dao Ancestor should have been killed by an incomparably powerful commander-level Zerg, and the strength of the other party was superior to that of an ordinary commander-level forbidden Zerg, and he also had a certain amount of wisdom, so he designed to surround the Blazing Dao Ancestor, thus killing the Blazing Dao Ancestor in one fell swoop.

The Blazing Dao Ancestor had been killed, and the corpse had already been taken away, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestors had not had time to retrieve the corpse.

It is conceivable that once the body of the Blazing Dao Ancestor is sent to the Forbidden Zerg Lair, it is very likely to prompt the birth of a lord-level Forbidden Zerg, and in that case, the pressure on the Dao Mountain Realm will be great.

this day.

The Wind King informed Ye Tian that the major forces were preparing to start a full-scale war, and once this all-out battlefield was won, it would be enough to inflict heavy losses on the Zerg and even rest for a period of time.

Ye Tian knew very well that the death of the Blazing Dao Ancestor was just an introduction, and those half-step domain ancestors didn't necessarily care about this, but the half-step domain ancestors didn't continue to delay it too much, and wanted to give the Forbidden Zerg a heavy blow, otherwise the Dao Ancestors would take over the news back and forth, and there would be insufficient manpower, so they would not be able to bring a heavy blow to the Forbidden Zerg at all.

Even on some battlefields, the Forbidden Zerg has the upper hand, but instead they will plunder more corpses, develop themselves, and strengthen themselves.

Therefore, collect all the Dao Ancestors in the major bases, and then requisition a group of Dao Ancestors from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and directly start a full-scale war, so that the Forbidden Zerg can be completely suppressed and dealt a heavy blow to the Forbidden Zerg.

One by one, the orders of the bases were issued, and the Dao Ancestors retreated from one battlefield to another, resting first, and after the Dao Ancestors arrived, they could start a full-scale war.

It didn't take long for a large number of Dao Ancestors to come from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, basically all of them were Dao Ancestors who belonged to the major forces, and even the Heavenly Emperor Palace sent many emperors.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Many Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain came one by one, and even the Invincible Dao Ancestor sent five of them this time, you must know that only one was sent before, that is, the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

"Six Invincible Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian was also shocked by the essence of Black Wind Mountain, obviously this was definitely not all Invincible Dao Ancestors.

These six Invincible Dao Ancestors used to be the Ten Kings, but now they have retired from the title of the Ten Kings.

This time, Black Wind Mountain sent six Invincible Dao Ancestors, ten Invincible Dao Ancestors from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, plus a few Invincible Dao Ancestors from scattered cultivation, and the Invincible Dao Ancestors of the three Nine Heaven Forces, there were about twenty Invincible Dao Ancestors dispatched in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

But this amount is still not as good as the Forbidden Zerg, because the Forbidden Zerg has at least more than fifty invincible Dao Ancestors.

The only advantage that the major forces have is the number of half-step domain ancestors, and there are a total of eight invincible Dao ancestors who appeared this time, and the White Tiger Palace Lord of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has also joined the battlefield.

However, there are only six lords in the Taboo Zerg battle, at least six in the eyes of other forces, and Black Wind Mountain will not expose the information, saying that there are still two lord-level Taboo Zerg in the Forbidden Zerg lair, otherwise it is difficult to explain.

Besides, Black Wind Mountain didn't think that those two lord-level forbidden zergs would come out to fight.

Therefore, at the level of the half-step domain ancestor, the major forces have an advantage, and it is completely possible for a half-step domain ancestor to slaughter the commander-level forbidden zerg, which makes up for the weakness of the number of invincible Dao ancestors.

this day.

The Dao Ancestors were ready, and in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, nearly 20 million Dao Ancestors set off, driving towards the Dark Forbidden Domain, advancing towards the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

Soon.

Some of the scattered forbidden zergs encountered the army of Dao Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and were ruthlessly suppressed and killed, and even several elite-level taboo zergs were wiped out in an instant.

At the beginning, the Forbidden Zerg obviously did not react, and more than 100,000 Forbidden Zerg were swept and killed.

But soon, the Forbidden Zerg also seemed to begin to converge, which meant that there were also wise Zerg in the Forbidden Zerg to command the battle.

"Be careful, the Dao Ancestors are scattered, the Forbidden Zerg army is coming!"

The voices of the half-step domain ancestors reached the ears of every Dao Ancestor.

Suddenly, one Dao Ancestor after another dispersed, so as not to be affected by the battle at the half-step Domain Ancestor level.

The first wave of battles was between the six-headed lord-level forbidden zerg and the seven half-step domain ancestors, and the most powerful Qinglong Palace master did not make a move, but hid.

Only the Qinglong Palace Master can be sure to kill the commander-level forbidden zerg with one blow, and the other half-step domain ancestors do not have this ability, it is really too difficult to kill the commander-level forbidden zerg.

The second wave belongs to the battlefield of the invincible Dao Ancestors, and the third wave is the battlefield of the Supreme Dao Ancestors.

And the other Dao Ancestors and a large number of ordinary forbidden zergs also quickly fought, and the battlefield stretched for a long time in the dark forbidden territory.

Ye Tian's copy body followed the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain to fight against the Forbidden Zerg, while his body led his family members to fight against the Forbidden Zerg, as long as he did not encounter a powerful Forbidden Zerg above the elite level, he was enough to protect his family from security threats.

---------------

On the battlefield of the invincible Dao Ancestors.

More than twenty invincible Dao Ancestors fought with fifty commander-level forbidden zergs, and they were completely crushed, and they couldn't be defeated at all.

Abrupt.

The Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace appeared, and with a single blow, he bombarded a commander-level forbidden zerg, directly killing him.

Then, the Qinglong Palace Master kept looking for those commander-level taboo zergs with forbidden weapons in hand, even the most powerful commander-level forbidden zerg could hardly block the blow of the Qinglong Palace Lord, which was enough to prove how powerful the Qinglong Palace Lord was.

With the fall of the commander-level taboo zerg one by one, the six lord-level taboo zerg were angry and wanted to come over to help.

However, how could the Eternal Dao Ancestor let these six lord-level forbidden zergs go to their aid, and did everything they could to stop them, so that they had no way to go over to support.
